name: Shizuka Mikazuki
description: Shizuka Mikazuki is a very rational girl who prefers to act alone. Her actions are determined by the benefits and risk of said situation. This is the main reason why she didn't join up with Akira and Kenichirou at first. Her personality is because of her upbringing. Her father was a successful business man. He was very strict and wanted her to be perfect, to succeed.
